Container.Name: MakerWorks-v2
Container.Overview: MakerWorks is a 3D printing commerce platform with storefront, instant quoting, checkout, customer order tracking, admin operations, backups, and optional StockWorks and PrintLab integrations.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL database, strong JWT/admin secrets, mapped storage, and Docker network makerworks-net.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the MakerWorks web UI.

Config.Name: Storage Path
Config.Description: Persistent uploads, generated files, and default backup storage.

Config.Name: Backup Path
Config.Description: Optional dedicated backup directory.

Config.Name: Bulk Import Path
Config.Description: Optional source directory for bulk model imports.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string for MakerWorks.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Long random secret used to sign application tokens.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: External URL users use to reach MakerWorks.

Config.Name: Storage Directory
Config.Description: Internal durable storage root.

Config.Name: Backup Directory
Config.Description: Internal backup destination. Leave /app/backups when the backup path is mapped.

Config.Name: Skip Docker for Backups
Config.Description: Use local pg_dump/psql inside the container instead of Docker Compose exec.

Config.Name: pg_dump Path
Config.Description: pg_dump path inside the MakerWorks image.

Config.Name: psql Path
Config.Description: psql path inside the MakerWorks image.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Initial admin email.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Initial admin password. Must be strong in production.

Config.Name: Admin Name
Config.Description: Initial admin display name.

Config.Name: Cookie Secure
Config.Description: Set true when MakerWorks is served only over HTTPS.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Optional Redis URL for background queues. Leave blank to disable queue-backed processing.

Config.Name: Currency
Config.Description: Server-side pricing currency, USD or CAD.

Config.Name: Public Currency
Config.Description: Client-side display currency, USD or CAD.

Config.Name: StockWorks Base URL
Config.Description: Optional StockWorks integration URL on makerworks-net.

Config.Name: StockWorks Username
Config.Description: Optional StockWorks username.

Config.Name: StockWorks Password
Config.Description: Optional StockWorks password.

Config.Name: PrintLab Base URL
Config.Description: Optional PrintLab integration URL on makerworks-net.

Config.Name: PrintLab API Key
Config.Description: Optional API key sent to PrintLab.

Config.Name: PrintLab API Key Header
Config.Description: Header used for PrintLab API key auth.

Config.Name: PrintLab Webhook Secret
Config.Description: Shared secret for PrintLab callbacks into MakerWorks.

Config.Name: Stripe Secret Key
Config.Description: Optional Stripe secret key.

Config.Name: Stripe Publishable Key
Config.Description: Optional Stripe publishable key.

Config.Name: Stripe Webhook Secret
Config.Description: Optional Stripe webhook signing secret.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone.
